results.title: Riyadh Air Commits to Purchase 28 Boeing 787 Dreamliners, Adds 787-10 to Future Fleet
results.description: Saudi carrier will exercise options for 28 787 Dreamliner jets from 2023 order and convert 20 options to largest 787 Dreamliner variant Riyadh Air has taken delivery of six 787-9 jets and currently serves six cities Agreement reaffirms Riyadh Air's plan to operate to over 100 global...

results.title: Amplio Review: Is This Alternative Investment Platform Worth Investing?
results.description: If you have been into the alternative investment space or researching alternative investment options in India, chances are you have come across a platform called Amplio (previously also known as Tyke). It shows up often in conversations about invoice discounting, fixed income alternatives, and platforms that promise “better than FD” returns. However, before you put ... Read more The post Amplio Review: Is This Alternative Investment Platform Worth Investing? appeared first on Random Dimes .

results.title: PageGroup unifies global brands under Michael Page
results.description: PageGroup has introduced a new brand structure that brings all its recruitment and outsourcing services together under the Michael Page name, creating a simpler, more connected experience for clients and candidates worldwide. The change reflects how clients already work with the business: as a single, trusted partner with deep expertise across markets, functions, and industries. [...] The post PageGroup unifies global brands under Michael Page appeared first on CXOToday.com .
